'''Yander''' was a member of the [[Khuiumin Survivors]] [[Rock Squadron]]. He was killed at the [[Battle of Xa Fel (11 ABY)|Second Battle of Xa Fel]] when he attacked [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[A-wing]]s.

==Appearances==
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
